title: UCC declarations (ariaflow-dashboard)
description: Shape contract for docs/ucc-declarations.yaml — the canonical UCC declaration artifact for ariaflow-dashboard's BGS-Verified claim. Validated by tests/test_ucc_declarations_schema.py.

expected_preferences.description: Backend preference names that must have a UI control.

additionalProperties.description: Reason the field is intentionally unused.

known_unused.description: Backend response fields the frontend intentionally ignores, with rationale per entry.

known_unused_expected_count.description: Stability guard. Must equal len(known_unused). Bumped by hand when entries change.

endpoint_coverage.description: Map of backend proxy endpoint identifier to the test(s) that cover it.

coverage_map.description: Map of UI action handler name to the test(s) that cover it.
